overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist exploring a medieval Middle Eastern city. The character walks through narrow sandstone alleys, covered bazaars with fabric awnings, and grand open courtyards with fountains, passing various NPCs and a decorated camel rider in a bright sunlit historic setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential courtyard with central fountain

events.description: moving from open courtyard into covered walkway with fabric awnings
character turns right at the carpet merchant stall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow courtyard and entering the covered bazaar section with blue fabric canopies

notable_agents.action: merchant standing beside a display of colorful stacked carpets

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with blue ceramic tiles at the center of the courtyard
tan-colored stone walls with arched wooden doors and small windows
stone archway supporting blue fabric awnings creating shade
wooden stall with stacks of colorful rugs and textiles displayed

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow sandstone courtyard with a central fountain. The character walks forward through the space, passing under a covered archway with blue fabric awnings. A merchant stands beside a carpet stall on the right as the character turns to navigate through the enclosed alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: terraced garden with decorative fountain wall

events.description: beginning to ascend wide stone staircase
exiting stairway into garden area with trees and greenery

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs past a decorative tiled fountain wall, moving toward the garden terrace

notable_agents.action: child in brown clothing running up the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn edges leading upward between walls
decorative wall with blue and white geometric tile patterns and water basin
tall leafy trees providing shade over the terrace

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by walls, passing a decorative blue-tiled fountain feature on the right. A child runs up the stairs ahead. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into a terraced garden with trees and climbing vines, transitioning from the enclosed alley to a greener, more open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined path leading to grand plaza

events.description: decorated camel with rider passes by on the right side of the path
approaching the open cobblestone plaza with central fountain visible

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path lined with palm trees, approaching the city plaza while passing a camel rider

notable_agents.action: decorated camel with rider in blue clothing walking past the character

entered.detail: tall date palms with green fronds lining the dirt path
low sandstone wall with flowering plants on top
opening to large public square with buildings and green awnings visible

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt path bordered by palm trees and a low stone wall. A decorated camel with a rider passes by on the right. The path opens up ahead to reveal a large plaza entrance with buildings and market awnings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand plaza with central fountain and palace stairs

events.description: entering the main cobblestone plaza with water features
character turns to survey the plaza and fountain area

agents.ego_description: exploring the open plaza, walking around the central fountain and approaching the grand staircase of the palace building

notable_agents.action: two women in dark robes sitting by the fountain edge conversing

entered.detail: wide open square with patterned cobblestone pavement
large octagonal stone fountain with multiple tiers and water
impressive palace structure with wide stairs and blue decorative banners
narrow reflecting pool with stone edges running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand open plaza with patterned cobblestones and a large central octagonal fountain. Two women sit conversing by the water's edge. The character approaches a magnificent palace building with wide stairs and blue banners, then turns to survey the plaza, revealing a water channel and additional market stalls in the square.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate confines of narrow sandstone alleys into the expansive grandeur of a royal plaza. It begins in a small courtyard with a central fountain, moving under blue fabric awnings and past a carpet stall as the character navigates an enclosed alleyway. The scene then ascends a wide stone staircase past a blue-tiled fountain, shifting from the tight urban corridors into a lush terraced garden filled with trees and climbing vines. As the character follows a sunlit dirt path bordered by palm trees, a decorated camel and rider pass by before the terrain opens up toward a distant market. Finally, the movement culminates in a grand open plaza with patterned cobblestones and a large octagonal fountain, leading the camera toward a magnificent palace adorned with blue banners.
